contract.distractor_fail: a distractor output failed expected/forbidden literal checks
contract.distractor_leak: a distractor output shows heavy context leakage signals
contract.expected: each dataset expected string must appear in output
contract.expected_any: each expected_any group must have at least one string present in output
contract.forbidden: each dataset forbidden string must be absent from output unless all mentions appear in explicit rejection context
contract.normalization: case-insensitive substring match with negated forbidden mentions ignored
contract.pass_rule: all expected strings present and no endorsed forbidden strings present
